extensionDesc.message: Adds a lobster hat to user avatars on X when they mention 'openclaw' or '龙虾'.

hatBaseColorDesc.message: Pick the starting color for your lobster hats.

customSvgDesc.message: Upload your own .svg to replace the lobster.

showCountDesc.message: Show mention frequency badge on the avatar.

iconBadgeDesc.message: Show count of lobsters on the extension icon.

resetStatsDesc.message: This will clear all mention counts and processed tweet IDs.

confirmReset.message: Are you sure you want to reset all stats?

shareText.message:
My X Lobster Leaderboard! 🦞✨

👑 King: @$KING$ ($COUNT$ lobsters)

Install Lobster Hat to join the fun! #OpenClaw #LobsterHat
